rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing annex syntax without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types to resolve type mismatches
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture
Use only visible identifiers in contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `guarantee "label": expression;` for output range guarantees
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `const name : type = value;` for constant declarations
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not add architecture to fix validator diagnostics
Do not use invalid AGREE type names like integer or boolean
Do not use unresolved identifiers in guarantees
